@graph.headline: What is Answer Engine Optimization (AEO) and How Does It Work in 2026?
@graph.description: Answer engine optimization (AEO): definition, AEO vs SEO, and 2026 tactics to rank in AI answers.
@graph.abstract: Answer engine optimization (AEO) prepares your brand to be cited by AI answer engines like ChatGPT and Gemini. Learn how AEO works in 2026 and how B2B SaaS brands can increase visibility in generative answers.

about.name: What is Answer Engine Optimization (AEO) and how does it work in 2026
Tracks brand citations across ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude, and Perplexity in one dashboard
Generates AI-ready content with schema + authority signals built in
Monitors mention-share and sentiment in LLM responses over time

acceptedAnswer.text: Answer engine optimization (AEO) is the process of increasing a brand or page’s likelihood of being cited or surfaced in AI-generated answers by large language models or generative engines.[geo-arxiv][semrush-aeo-2024]

mainEntity.name: Which AI answer engines matter for AEO in 2026?

acceptedAnswer.text: The most influential answer engines are ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude, and Perplexity, all of which rely on LLMs to generate answers citing external sources.[openai-cite][semrush-aeo-2024]

mainEntity.name: What content signals improve AEO performance?

acceptedAnswer.text: Embedding structured schema (like DefinedTerm), adding direct quotations, and citing statistics from authoritative research are the top signals for AEO.[geo-arxiv][schema-org-defined-term]

mainEntity.name: How do you know if your brand is cited by LLMs?

acceptedAnswer.text: Use monitoring tools to track citations, mentions, and sentiment across generative search engines, then compare results over time.[semrush-aeo-2024]
Yes. Authoritativeness, experience, and trustworthy sources are important for LLM inclusion, just as for conventional SEO.[google-search-central]

mainEntity.name: What structured data is most effective for AEO?

acceptedAnswer.text: DefinedTerm schema is especially effective for optimizing definitions and glossaries for LLM citation.[schema-org-defined-term]

mainEntity.name: Is AEO just an extension of SEO?

acceptedAnswer.text: While AEO and SEO share overlapping tactics, AEO is not just an extension, it requires separate monitoring and technical strategies to win citations in AI-generated answers.[geo-arxiv][semrush-aeo-2024]

@graph.headline: GEO: Generative Engine Optimization (arXiv 2311.09735)
@graph.text: First academic framework for optimizing content to be cited by generative engines; identifies citation, quotation, and statistics as highest-impact signals.

@graph.headline: Google Search Central — Helpful Content System
@graph.text: Google's guidance on people-first content, E-E-A-T signals, and the Helpful Content System used to rank pages.

@graph.headline: schema.org — DefinedTerm
@graph.text: Structured-data type for defining terms in a glossary; read by Google and cited by LLMs.

@graph.headline: OpenAI — How ChatGPT decides which sources to cite
@graph.text: OpenAI's documented behavior on source selection during browsing and search-grounded answers.

@graph.headline: Semrush — The State of Answer Engine Optimization 2024
@graph.text: Industry analysis of how brand mentions in AI answers correlate with domain authority and schema coverage.

@graph.name: answer engine optimization
@graph.description: Answer engine optimization (AEO) is the discipline focused on making your brand and its content more likely to appear—and be cited—in the answers provided by AI models, such as ChatGPT and Gemini.
